settings.headline: A 24/7 security operations centre — without hiring one.
settings.subhead: Human analysts plus AI triage. ACSC Essential Eight aligned. Median time-to-contain: 11 minutes.

settings.headline: Threat detection that never sleeps.
settings.body: SentryOps combines continuous endpoint telemetry, network sensors, and Microsoft 365 audit logs — correlated through an AI triage engine and escalated to Perth-based analysts only when it matters.

settings.headline: Built for the ACSC Essential Eight.
settings.body: Controls, logs, and evidence are automatically mapped to the eight ACSC mitigation strategies — so every SentryOps deployment doubles as progress against ML1, ML2, or ML3.

settings.headline: Teams that swapped legacy SIEMs for SentryOps.
settings.lede: Three Australian SMBs. Three outages avoided. One platform.

settings.quote: SentryOps contained a ransomware attempt in 9 minutes — at 2am on a Saturday. We didn't even lose a file.
settings.name: Priya S.

settings.quote: We went from 40 alert emails a day to 2 actionable incidents. Our team sleeps again.
settings.name: Jack R.

settings.quote: Passing the Essential Eight audit was effectively automatic — the evidence export saved weeks.
settings.name: Sam K.

settings.headline: What teams ask before switching their SOC.
settings.lede: All the operational detail you need to make the decision.

settings.question: What endpoints are supported?
settings.answer: Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android, plus Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, AWS, Azure, and GCP telemetry.

settings.question: How fast can SentryOps be deployed?
settings.answer: Median time to live threat monitoring is 48 hours — including agent rollout and alert routing.

settings.question: What SLAs are offered?
settings.answer: 1-hour response on Severity 1 incidents, 4-hour on Severity 2. Australian business hours + 24/7 on-call for Sev 1.

settings.question: Do you replace existing antivirus?
settings.answer: No — we layer on top of whatever EDR you have, including Microsoft Defender, CrowdStrike, or SentinelOne.

settings.headline: Sleep better knowing a human analyst is watching.
settings.lede: 14-day free trial. Deployed in 48 hours. Cancel anytime.
